title: Email Tracking - Clicks & Opens Within Gmail
excerpt: I love Monday CRM but this annoys me so much… I mainly operate out of Gmail for sending emails. As I am aware, Monday has no chrome extension that allows me to quickly see if my email was opened or clicked (One of my fav…

posts.author: IanLenhart (Ian Lenhart)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love Monday CRM but this annoys me so much… I mainly operate out of Gmail for sending emails. As I am aware, Monday has no chrome extension that allows me to quickly see if my email was opened or clicked (One of my favorite UIs for this is MixMax). Therefore I am flying blind, unless I send the email directly within Monday CRM platform. This is extremely annoying and forces me to use another Chrome extension to track email opens/closes out of everyday gmail messages.

This feature would improve my productivity and happiness 10 fold as someone who does sales and is constantly working within gmail/monday.
